sub: URGENT — Preservation of CCTV footage — [INCIDENT] on [DATE]
b:
To whom it concerns,

I am Garda [NAME], [REG NO], attached to [STATION].

I am investigating an incident that occurred at or near [LOCATION] on [DATE] between approximately [TIME] and [TIME].

I have reason to believe that your CCTV system may have recorded footage of evidential value to this investigation.

I am requesting that you PRESERVE, and not overwrite, delete or alter, all CCTV footage from your system for the period:

    From: [DATE] [TIME]
    To:   [DATE] [TIME]
    Cameras: ALL cameras covering [AREA / STREET / ENTRANCE]

Many systems overwrite automatically within 7 to 31 days. Please take steps to preserve this footage TODAY, pending a formal request for its disclosure.

A formal request under the Data Protection Act 2018 will follow. Preservation now does not oblige you to release the footage; it simply ensures it is not lost while the lawful request is processed.

Please confirm by reply that the footage has been preserved, and advise:
  • the retention period of your system;
  • the format in which footage can be provided;
  • a contact name and number for collection.

If you have any questions, please contact me at [STATION] on [PHONE].

Yours faithfully,

Garda [NAME]
[REG NO]
[STATION]
[DATE]

t: s.41 Data Protection Act 2018 request — for Superintendent signature
sub: Data Protection Act 2018 — Request for disclosure of personal data — [INCIDENT REF]
b:
NOTE: This is drafted for signature by the District Officer. Send it to your own official email, then forward to the District Office for the Superintendent's signature on headed paper. Do not issue it under your own name.

---

[DISTRICT OFFICE HEADED PAPER]

To: [DATA CONTROLLER / BUSINESS NAME]
    [ADDRESS]

Re: Request for disclosure of personal data — Data Protection Act 2018

Dear Sir/Madam,

An Garda Síochána is investigating [OFFENCE] contrary to [STATUTE], alleged to have occurred at [LOCATION] on [DATE].

Pursuant to section 41 of the Data Protection Act 2018, personal data may be processed and disclosed where such processing is necessary and proportionate for the purposes of preventing, detecting, investigating or prosecuting a criminal offence.

I hereby request disclosure of the following personal data, which is necessary for the purposes of this criminal investigation:

    Description of data sought: CCTV footage / records
    Location / cameras: [SPECIFY]
    Period: [DATE] [TIME] to [DATE] [TIME]

I confirm that:
  • the data is sought for the purpose of the investigation and prosecution of a criminal offence;
  • the request is necessary and proportionate to that purpose;
  • the data will be processed in accordance with the Data Protection Act 2018 and retained only as long as necessary.

The investigating member is Garda [NAME], [REG NO], [STATION], who may be contacted at [PHONE] / [EMAIL].

Please provide the material to the investigating member at the above station.

Yours faithfully,

_______________________
[NAME], Superintendent
[DISTRICT]
An Garda Síochána
[DATE]

t: Passport Office enquiry — for Superintendent signature
b:
NOTE: Route via your official email to the District Office for Superintendent signature on headed paper.

---

[DISTRICT OFFICE HEADED PAPER]

To: The Passport Office
    Department of Foreign Affairs

Re: Request for information — criminal investigation

Dear Sir/Madam,

An Garda Síochána is conducting a criminal investigation into [OFFENCE] contrary to [STATUTE], alleged to have occurred at [LOCATION] on [DATE].

Pursuant to section 41 of the Data Protection Act 2018, I request the following information in respect of:

    Name: [FULL NAME]
    Date of birth: [DOB]
    Last known address: [ADDRESS]

    Information sought:
      • Confirmation of whether a passport has issued to this person
      • Passport number, date of issue and expiry
      • The photograph and application details held
      • Address(es) given on application
      • Any recent application, renewal or reported loss

This information is necessary and proportionate for the purposes of investigating and prosecuting the offence described, specifically to [STATE THE PURPOSE — e.g. establish identity / trace the suspect / confirm nationality].

Investigating member: Garda [NAME], [REG NO], [STATION], [PHONE], [EMAIL].

Yours faithfully,

_______________________
[NAME], Superintendent
[DISTRICT]
[DATE]

t: Dept. of Social Protection enquiry — for Superintendent signature
sub: Garda enquiry — Social welfare records — [NAME] — [INCIDENT REF]
b:
NOTE: Route via your official email to the District Office for Superintendent signature on headed paper.

---

[DISTRICT OFFICE HEADED PAPER]

To: Department of Social Protection
    [RELEVANT SECTION]

Re: Request for information — criminal investigation

Dear Sir/Madam,

An Garda Síochána is investigating [OFFENCE] contrary to [STATUTE], alleged to have occurred at [LOCATION] on [DATE].

Pursuant to section 41 of the Data Protection Act 2018, I request the following in respect of:

    Name: [FULL NAME]
    Date of birth: [DOB]
    PPSN (if known): [PPSN]
    Last known address: [ADDRESS]

    Information sought:
      • Current and previous addresses held on record
      • Details of any payments currently in issue and the collection point
      • Date and place of last claim signed / payment collected
      • Photograph held on the Public Services Card record, if any

This information is necessary and proportionate for the purposes of this criminal investigation, specifically to [STATE PURPOSE — e.g. establish the current address of a suspect for the execution of a warrant].

Investigating member: Garda [NAME], [REG NO], [STATION], [PHONE], [EMAIL].

Yours faithfully,

_______________________
[NAME], Superintendent
[DISTRICT]
[DATE]
